section_miscategorizations.text: Physical exam reveals small breast lumps that persist despite previous cycles.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The existence of breast lumps on exam is objective, but describing that they "persist despite previous cycles" synthesizes temporal behavior and clinical significance, which is more consistent with assessment rather than a pure objective finding.

section_miscategorizations.text: Ultrasound was performed during the office exam to assess the lumps.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Performance of an ultrasound is a procedure/order-level management action. While results would belong in O, documenting that the ultrasound was performed as part of management is more appropriately captured in the plan.
